features.description: Delete the old TUI directory (kazma-tui/kazma_tui/) and archive kazma-providers/kazma_providers/router.py to archive/kazma-providers/
preconditions: Old TUI directory exists at kazma-tui/kazma_tui/
expectedBehavior: No references to old TUI classes remain in codebase

features.description: Create new TUI package structure with __init__.py, __main__.py, and app.py. Set up Textual app with Header, Footer, and placeholder widgets. Update pyproject.toml entry point.
expectedBehavior: pyproject.toml entry point points to new module

features.description: Implement header with provider/model info from ModelRegistry and footer with keyboard shortcuts. Ensure English-only UI.
expectedBehavior: Header displays active provider and model from ModelRegistry
Footer displays keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Q quit, Tab switch, Enter send)
All UI text is in English
No Arabic characters or RTL markers

features.description: Implement metrics dashboard with CPU/Memory (HardwareMonitor), RPM (TraceStore), latency (MetricsCollector), error rate (MetricsCollector), and active agents (SwarmEngine). Add periodic refresh.
preconditions: HardwareMonitor, MetricsCollector, TraceStore, SwarmEngine are available
expectedBehavior: Dashboard displays CPU percentage and RAM usage
Dashboard displays average latency from MetricsCollector

features.description: Implement chat interface with input field, message display, and command support (/help, /clear, /quit).
expectedBehavior: Chat input accepts text and is focused on mount
Chat displays user and assistant messages

features.description: Write comprehensive tests for TUI components: header, footer, dashboard, chat, and integration tests for ModelRegistry and metrics.
